functional_purpose: Receives PAS HL7v2 messages through Mirth channel routing and synchronises OpenEyes patient, appointment, merge, and did-not-attend data for the Anytown practice.
business_process: Patient demographics, attendance, appointment, patient merge, and DNA synchronisation.
ack_behaviour: HL7 response generation is AA/AE/AR; source responseVariable is None and respondAfterProcessing is false.
auth_method: HTTP Basic preemptive (api with redacted password)
main_filters: A40 selects secondary patient and patient merge handling.
M05 is excluded from patient/referral handling.
Appointment handling selects listed ADT/SIU events and excludes ReportFile OBX.
main_transformer_stages: Maps PV1 institution to a LOCAL practice identifier.
Builds PASAPI patient XML from PID, PV1, PV2, PD1, and MRG fields.
Derives hospital number, visit metadata, booking type, and DNA data in channelMap for destinations.
error_handling: Transformer scripts catch exceptions, log errors, and use empty mapping values; response transformers inspect PASAPI warnings.
retry_behaviour: All HTTP destinations have queueEnabled false and retryCount 0 (retryIntervalMillis 10000).
queue_behaviour: No destination queueing; source queue buffer size is 1000.
logging: Logs transformer exceptions and PASAPI warnings; patient-derived context may be logged.

evidence.claim: Newmedica PAS In LOCAL-1-0 (ffa240cd-f1be-42c1-a986-ef9a203d7e58) has HL7V2 Channel Reader source, AA/AE/AR response generation, and HTTP sender destinations.
evidence.location: Newmedica/PAS.xml; canonical/Newmedica/PAS In LOCAL-1-0.xml sourceConnector lines 7-115 and destinationConnectors lines 121-3211

evidence.claim: Destination hosts are PASAPI V1/V3 Patient, V3 PatientAppointment, V3 PatientMerge, and V3 DidNotAttend; transformers map HL7 fields and filters select A40 and appointment/ReportFile conditions.
evidence.location: Newmedica/PAS.xml; canonical/Newmedica/PAS In LOCAL-1-0.xml destination connector properties, transformers, and filters lines 121-3211

evidence.claim: The directly compared identical structure includes Channel Reader source, PASAPI V1/V3 HTTP destinations, HL7 to PASAPI transformers, and A40/appointment/ReportFile filters.
evidence.location: Newmedica/PAS.xml; canonical/Newmedica/PAS In LOCAL-184-0.xml sourceConnector and destinationConnectors (full-file structural comparison)
